title: Inhibitory specificity from a connectomic census of mouse visual cortex
abstract: Using mm-scale volumetric EM, we investigate connectivity of all inhibitory neurons across 1,352 cells spanning all layers of mouse visual cortex, producing a wiring diagram of >70,000 synapses and identifying a disinhibitory specialist class targeting basket cells.
notes: Already in existing 102. Connectomic census of inhibitory cell types.
